name: Tome of the Mushroom Tribes
description: Notes This tome spawns a stationary healing mushroom wherever your cursor is, which heals 75 health every second (for a total of 225 HP). It is a uniquely useful tome for these reasons:
effects: On Ability use: Create a Healing Mushroom that lasts 6 seconds. While within range: Grants 90 HP/s Healing effect Range: 6
